description_long: This is a life-sized horse with a sleek, muscular build and a smooth, dark brown coat. Its mane and tail are a striking light gray, providing a strong contrast to the body. The horse's head is well-proportioned, with alert ears and a slightly arched neck, giving it a noble appearance. The legs are slender yet sturdy, with visible joints and a single white marking on the front left hoof. The tail is long and full, hanging straight down. There are no visible accessories, tack, or equipment on the horse, and its posture suggests a calm, standing position.
description: A realistic, dark brown horse with a light gray mane and tail, standing calmly with a muscular build and no visible tack.
description_view_0: Side view showing the horse's left profile, highlighting the light gray mane and tail, and a white marking on the front left hoof.
description_view_1: Rear view displaying the full length of the tail and the symmetry of the hindquarters.
description_view_2: Side view of the right profile, showing the smooth body and the tail draped along the hind leg.
description_view_3: Front view focusing on the horse's head, chest, and the light gray mane falling to one side.
attribute_pose: Standing square with a relaxed, attentive posture.
attribute_mane_style: Loose and flowing, draped naturally along the neck.
attribute_leg_position: All four legs are on the ground, with the front left leg slightly forward.
